event.description: exploratory snapshot — 60 markets across 6 US cities (Austin, Chicago, Denver, Miami, Philadelphia, San Antonio), high/low temperature contracts. No single event was selected for entry.

notes: Run 001 was an end-to-end pipeline dry-run on 2026-05-08, not a position. No paper bet was placed (predictor/data/ledger/paper_bets.csv is header-only) and no single market was selected, so the markets array is intentionally empty. Phase 1 N counter remains at 0 until Run 002 opens an actual paper position. See REPORT.md for the full builder-log narrative and the on-disk artifacts under predictor/data/.
